CustomField.description: This field shows the difference between Today and Staged 6 moved date excluding weekend (Source: RITM0093530)
CustomField.formula: If ( StageNumber__c = 6 , (5 * FLOOR( ( DATEVALUE(Now()) - DATE( 1900, 1, 8) ) / 7 ) + MIN( 5, MOD( DATEVALUE(Now()) - DATE( 1900, 1, 8), 7 ) ) ) - (5 * FLOOR( ( DATEVALUE(LastStageChangeDate) - DATE( 1900, 1, 8) ) / 7 ) + MIN( 5, MOD( DATEVALUE(LastStageChangeDate) - DATE( 1900, 1, 8), 7 ) ) ) , NULL )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Number of working days between today and LastStageMoved date in stage 6
CustomField.label: SLA Days
